title: How CoQ10 Supports Energy After 40 (and Why Most Supplements Fall Short)
tags: CoQ10, energy, mitochondria, women over 40, longevity, cellular health, fatigue
summary: CoQ10 production declines by up to 50% after age 40, directly impairing mitochondrial energy output. This article explains the science behind CoQ10 and fatigue, why standard supplements fail due to poor absorption, and how liposomal CoQ10 can restore cellular energy for women in midlife.
featured_image_alt: Energetic woman over 40 living an active lifestyle
